arts.ttl: Former Celtic boss Ronny Deila lands next managerial role and is 'eager' to make an instant impact
arts.sum: Returning to Major League Soccer, Deila has been appointed as Atlanta United’s new manager ahead of the forthcoming campaign. Ronny Deila appointed as Atlanta United’s new boss

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton has his say on Celtic's chances of landing Kieran Tierney as return links escalate
arts.sum: Earlier this week, news emerged that Celtic are targeting Kieran Tierney after Arsenal opted not to activate his one-year contract extension clause, leaving the Scotland international set to become a free agent next summer. Chris Sutton has his say on potential Kieran Tierney Celtic move

arts.ttl: Daniel Cummings continues superb Celtic B form in thumping Friday night victory
arts.sum: The 27-year-old is free to discuss a pre-contract from January, but the Irishman still retains hope he will commit his future to the club. Another man who falls into that category is Celtic B star Daniel Cummings, who has enjoyed some excellent form in front of goal this season under Stephen McManus .

arts.ttl: I'm all for Rangers Cup Final replay if they let me dig out my boots to do 2003 Celtic clash over again – Chris Sutton
arts.sum: The controversy has sparked a drastic solution - which the Hoops hero has surprisingly backed

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney sees his Celtic transfer return split the Jury but it's a different story for Cyriel Dessers at Rangers
arts.sum: Record Sport's top team are on hand to give their views on FOUR big burning questions in Scottish football

arts.ttl: Former Celtic boss lands new role managing MLS club
arts.sum: A former Celtic boss has landed his second role managing within the MLS.

arts.ttl: Inside Dermot Desmond's summit with Celtic powerbrokers as one 'myth' about supremo torn apart
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers joined the Hoops' higher-ups to meet with Desmond in Ireland

arts.ttl: Neil Lennon fancies 'another crack' at management job as ex-Celtic boss targets next role
arts.sum: Neil Lennon has 12 winners’ medals from his time as a manager. Still, Lennon is enjoying his time in the media on commentary and punditry duties for the likes of Premier Sports and TNT Sports.

arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel shares secret behind Celtic transfer as he opens up on 'bit of banter' with Rangers fans
arts.sum: The Hoops No1 has been a top performer for Brendan Rodgers and showed his class in the League Cup Final shootout

arts.ttl: Popular Celtic theatre show to return in 2025, tickets still available
arts.sum: Celtic claim that a ticket to the event would be the "perfect Christmas gift".
